name: claude-docsmith
description: Generate user and developer documentation from a repository using Claude Code, with optional local Ollama fallback.

interface.shortDescription: Refresh user and developer docs from the current codebase.
interface.longDescription: Scans repositories, applies the update-docs skill, and generates documentation updates through Claude Code, with optional local Ollama fallback.
defaultPrompt: Update the README and developer docs for this repository.
Inspect this repo and generate user and developer documentation separately.
Refresh installation, usage, troubleshooting, architecture, and contribution docs.
